channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dr. Erica Schwartz faces questions on vaccines at CDC director hearing
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz appeared before a Senate committee Wednesday for her confirmation hearing as CDC director.

item.title: Maps show Canadian wildfire smoke drifting into the US
item.description: As of Wednesday morning, more than 830 wildfires are burning across Canada.

item.title: Iran live updates: US launches second round of strikes on Wednesday
item.description: President Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Blanche says anti-weaponization fund is 'dead' at confirmation hearing
item.description: Blanche told the Senate Judiciary Committee that the weaponization fund is a moot issue and no longer exists.
